title: verify_google_oauth_authentication_and_role_based_access_control
description: Test the Google OAuth login flow via Supabase, ensuring JWT tokens are issued correctly and role-based access control is enforced for admin, facilitator, and viewer roles.

title: validate_dashboard_statistics_and_recent_sessions_display
description: Verify that the dashboard API correctly aggregates and returns total sessions, action items, average repeatability, and recent session activities.

title: test_session_management_crud_and_search_filter_functionality
description: Ensure session listing, viewing, searching, filtering, and editing APIs work correctly, persisting metadata, ratings, and AI analyses as expected.

title: validate_google_sheets_import_and_data_processing
description: Test the import API that fetches survey responses from Google Sheets, verifying data grouping by session ID and correct calculation of averaged ratings.

title: verify_ai_analysis_of_open_ended_survey_questions
description: Test the AI analysis endpoint that uses OpenAI GPT-4o to analyze open-ended survey questions and generate thematic analyses and common issues tables.

title: validate_session_ratings_calculation_and_display
description: Verify that the session ratings API returns accurate calculations for all nine rating metrics including overall quality and repeatability.

title: test_action_item_lifecycle_management
description: Ensure APIs for creating, editing, deleting, and tracking action items function correctly with validations on priority, status, assignee, and deadlines.

title: validate_reports_facilitator_performance_and_session_comparisons
description: Test the reports API to ensure facilitator performance metrics and session rating comparisons are accurate and reflect underlying data.

title: verify_theme_toggle_persistence_and_ui_switching
description: Test the theme toggle API or context to ensure user preferences for light and dark modes persist and UI switches without visual or functional issues.

title: validate_api_requests_jwt_token_inclusion_and_error_handling
description: Verify that all API requests include JWT tokens in headers and that the system handles authorization errors and other API errors gracefully.
